change_request: Replace static lib/learn.ts article data with a dynamically fetched JSON file from Google Cloud Storage so new articles can be published without redeploying
acceptance_criteria: learn index page fetches articles from GCS at request time with revalidate 60s
learn slug page fetches article by slug from GCS with revalidate 60s
GCS fetch failure returns empty list or notFound without crashing
lib/learn.ts retains only interfaces and fetch functions with no data arrays

scope.change_request: Replace static lib/learn.ts article data with a dynamically fetched JSON file from Google Cloud Storage so new articles can be published without redeploying
acceptance_criteria: learn index page fetches articles from GCS at request time with revalidate 60s
learn slug page fetches article by slug from GCS with revalidate 60s
GCS fetch failure returns empty list or notFound without crashing
lib/learn.ts retains only interfaces and fetch functions with no data arrays

llm_analysis.assessment: The changes successfully replace static article data with dynamically fetched data from GCS. The migration script, GCS fetch implementation, and environment variable usage align with the change request.

risks: Network errors during GCS fetch could lead to unexpected behavior in app/[lang]/learn/page.tsx:LearnIndexPage.
Incorrectly formatted JSON in GCS could cause parsing errors in lib/learn.ts:getArticles or lib/learn.ts:getArticle.
Changes to the GCS URL or object structure without corresponding code updates could break the application in lib/learn.ts.

llm_analysis.notes: GCS fetch failures are handled by returning an empty list or notFound, preventing crashes.
The API for fetching articles changes from a static import to an asynchronous fetch. No migration is needed as the return type (Article) remains the same.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Tests are needed to verify GCS fetch success and failure scenarios, as well as data integrity. Add integration tests to cover the new GCS fetching logic.

rollback.head: ae189b0466ec31b101dd94b526d8143fb2c3ebe3
rollback_steps: 2. Resolve any merge conflicts if prompted
rollback.additional_cleanup: Review affected files for any required data/config cleanup

overall.summary: The changes implement the requested functionality, but lack sufficient testing. Integration tests are needed to ensure the GCS fetch is reliable and handles errors gracefully.
key_concerns: Missing integration tests for GCS fetch.

block_reasons: CE recommendation: BLOCK - The changes implement the requested functionality, but lack sufficient testing. Integration tests are needed to ensure the GCS fetch is reliable and handles errors gracefully.
Missing integration tests for GCS fetch.
